Climate Change and CQNUMC In this latest use, especially in the context of environmental policies, the term climate change often refers only to changes in modern climate, including the increase in the global average temperature on the Earth's surface, known as global warming.

Climate Change and the IPCC According to the Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (IPCC), climate change is a long-term, statistically significant variation in a mean climate parameter (such as temperature, precipitation or winds) or in its variability over an extended period (which can last from decades to millions of years).
